# Exp Live Entertainment

> Extended content: https://explive.in/llms-full.txt


> Exp Live Entertainment (Exp Live Entertainment LLP) is an India-based live events company that organizes music festivals, concerts, artist solo tours, and curated cultural experiences. Headquartered in Thane, Maharashtra, with events across India, primarily in Mumbai.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://explive.in/): Overview of the company, upcoming live events (Seasona Festival 2026, Ehsaas e Shaam), event categories, and a summary of who we are.
- [About](https://explive.in/about/): Full company story, services offered, and mission — "Shaping the future of India's festivals and live entertainment culture." Covers production, logistics, artist management, and festival building.
- [Contact](https://explive.in/contact/): Reach out for event bookings, artist management inquiries, or collaborations. Email: info@explive.in

## Company

- Legal Name: Exp Live Entertainment LLP
- Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India (events held across India, primarily Mumbai)
- Email: info@explive.in
- Services: Music Festivals, Artist Solo Tours, Concert Experiences, Artist Management, IP Experiences
- Mission: Shaping the future of India's festivals and live entertainment culture

## Upcoming Events

- Seasona Festival 2026 — 23rd May 2026, Bandra Fort, Mumbai
- Ehsaas e Shaam — 10th July 2026, Dome at NSCI, Mumbai

## Social Profiles

- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/expliveent/
- Twitter/X: https://x.com/expliveent
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@expliveent
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/exp-live-entertainment/
